CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100195642) (TRANSACTION ID # 100195642) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS, IRIS ADAMS, CHARLES JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PLEAD FACTS REQUIRED FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (CODE CIV. PROC., 3294(B).) LATE OPPOSITION WAS CONSIDERED BUT STRICKEN. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO AMEND. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-28-2023 CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT FAILS TO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) WITH PARTICULARITY REGARDING MALICE, OPPRESSION OR FRAUD AS TO THE CORPORATE DEFENDANTS. OPPOSITION (WHICH APPEARS TO BE SUBSTANTIVELY IDENTICAL TO THE PREVIOUSLY FILED OPPOSITION RE: MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT) DOES NOT INCLUDE ANY PROPOSED AMENDMENTS THAT COULD SATISFY THE PLEADING REQUIREMENTS. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED without leave to amend. Third Amended Complaint fails to allege facts (not conclusions) with particularity regarding malice, oppression or fraud as to the corporate defendants. Opposition (which appears to be substantively identical to the previously filed opposition re: Motion to Strike Second Amended Complaint) does not include any proposed amendments that could satisfy the pleading requirements.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar May-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 1880 PINE, L.P. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS 1880 PINE LP), MERCY HLUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND Amended COMPLAINT

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS 1880 PINE, L.P. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS 1880 PINE LP), MERCY HLUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT is transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on the same day. That department handles all landlord/tenant cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances
The court did not hear the motion but when role was taken parties were not contesting tentive but defendant was requesting clarification.

The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED, with leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to plead facts required for punitive damages. (Code Civ. Proc., 3294(b).) Late opposition was considered but stricken. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Plaintiff has 10 days from the date of entry of order to amend.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)
